title: mesona capitata
intro: Mesona capitata, also known as Japanese mesona or Asian mint, is a perennial herb native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mesona capitata include relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Mesona capitata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
